name: Almond Mocha Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 tablespoons Instant coffee dissolved in cold water
1 cup Slivered almonds; toasted and coarsely chopped
2 tablespoons Cold strong coffee (1 tablespoon instant coffee dissolved in 2 tablespoons cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 13 x 9-inch (33 cm x 23 cm) pan with shortening. Place cooling rack on countertop.
2. For bars, combine brown sugar, shortening, coffee mixture, vanilla, and almond extract in a large bowl. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into creamed mixture.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, salt, and baking soda. Mix into creamed mixture at low speed just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips and almonds. Spread mixture evenly in prepared pan.
4. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, or until set. Do not overbake. Cool completely in pan on wire rack. Cut into bars.
5. For glaze, combine icing sugar and coffee in a small bowl. Stir until well blended. Add additional coffee if the mixture is too thick to drizzle. Drizzle over cooled bars. Makes: 3 dozen bars
